Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Eldest]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — The Eldest's title is passed down to another when he dies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — The Eldest was pleased to have new humans in the House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — The Eldest was testing Andra's potential.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — The Eldest is the Nye Eldest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — The Eldest is a faded Nye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 18''' — The black cloak is the cloak of the Nye and a mark of their bargain.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — The Eldest would be unhappy if Simon left his cloak behind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — The Eldest is a character in a black hood who speaks to Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — The Eldest of the Nye holds Mithra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — The Eldest might be angry with Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — The Eldest Nye seeks the restoration of Valinhall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — The Eldest wants the Territory to grow and expand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — The Eldest is someone who can find a hidden mask.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — The Eldest was standing in the doorway of the workshop.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 1''' — The Eldest Nye is a character who moves with stealth and grace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — The Eldest Nye is shorter than most Nye, reaching only Simon's shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — The Eldest Nye glides over tiles instead of walking with legs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — The Eldest Nye has hands that are hidden in voluminous sleeves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — The Eldest is a character capable of stopping Simon physically.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — The Eldest has tasks for Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Valin knew the Eldest Nye long ago.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — The Eldest fears losing power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — The Eldest stated there were more pressing vacancies to be filled.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — The Eldest may have brought Valin back.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — The Eldest Nye wears stormcloud gray robes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — The Eldest Nye wears a void for a face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — The Eldest is a character who refuses to tell Simon everything.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — The Eldest Nye has a resurrection technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — The Eldest wants the expansion of Valinhall at all costs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — The Eldest stood before two caged human females.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — The Eldest is considering whether Indirial succumbing to his chains is a loss or a gain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — The Eldest intends to decide what is to be done about Indirial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — The Eldest views the two women as valuable pieces.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — The Eldest Nye is a hunched figure in dark gray who glides to the Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — The Eldest is missing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — The Eldest Nye stands beside Kai.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — The Eldest locked the family in their gallery.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — The Eldest was waiting for Kai in the forge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — The Eldest is capable of performing miracles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — The Eldest is a person Simon fears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 28''' — The Eldest can materialize out of shadow.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
